info.title: trcaret
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trcaret
## Summary
Print a line with caret underneath for beginning of tree.
## Description
Reads a tree from stdin and prints lines and caret marks.
## Usage
trcaret [options]
## Examples
trquery grep //lexerRuleSpec | trcaret -H
## Current version
0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.

-f, --file             Read parse tree data from file instead of stdin.
-H, --with-filename    Print the file name for each match.
-p, --prefix
-v, --verbose
--version
--help                 Display this help screen.
--version              Display version information.
